name: Archtis Limited
analysis: AR9 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 67% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.0900, stop A$0.0673, target A$0.1000 (0.44:1) — then trail it.
